import re, unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics pattern
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')

def normalize_ar(s):
    # remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms to alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # unify ta marbuta? maybe leave.
    # unify alef maqsura to ya? or to alif? We'll map ى to ي
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # unify hamza on ya/waw?
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', s)
    # normalize spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s
